title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory
description: A Venn diagram showing the structure and properties that define a group, illustrating how groups are a specific type of algebraic structure.
relationships: The Set and Operation form a Magma if Closure holds
A Magma becomes a Semigroup if Associativity holds
A Semigroup becomes a Monoid if an Identity Element exists
A Monoid becomes a Group if every element has an Inverse
